evidence: Baseline: 889. Final (60s): 1060. Growth: +171 (+19.2%). Consistent ~2.85/s from partitions. Pipeline stage 1 FLOWING.

Baseline: 100000. Stream AT MAXLEN cap (100,000) throughout entire smoke test. Trimming at same rate as production. Stage technically producing but at overflow capacity. ~90 opportunities/s production rate exceeds buffer capacity.
actual: AT MAXLEN CAP throughout. Coordinator active (pending reduced 200→19). Stage flowing but losing data to trimming.
recommendation: Increase MAXLEN for stream:opportunities. At 90/s rate, 100k provides only ~18 min buffer.

evidence: Baseline: 922. Final (60s): 922. Growth: 0. execution-results FROZEN for entire session (16+ minutes). Execution engine consumer: last-delivered-id unchanged at 1772538536639-25, entries-read=984 (unchanged), lag=5000 (unchanged). queueRejects=7. 85794 execution requests lost to MAXLEN trimming.
expected: execution-results growing as engine processes requests
actual: STALLED — execution pipeline completely halted at final stage. Full cascade: price-updates(FLOWING) → opportunities(AT CAP) → execution-requests(AT CAP, not consumed) → execution-results(FROZEN=922).
recommendation: Root cause: 7 ghost PEL entries (data trimmed, PEL retained). Fix: XAUTOCLAIM stream:execution-requests execution-engine-group temp 0 0-0 COUNT 10, then XACK the IDs. Also investigate why queue capacity was exceeded (queueRejects=7) and tune MAX_CONCURRENT_EXECUTIONS.

evidence: Baseline: 0. Final (60s): 0. DLQ: 0 growth. forwarding-dlq: 0. Pipeline not producing rejected messages.

Trace propagation confirmed in execution-requests: _trace_traceId, _trace_spanId, _trace_parentSpanId, _trace_serviceName all present in latest entries. Latest execution result (1772538620587-0) has traceId=be42aaff... from 16 min ago. Cannot verify end-to-end trace (opportunities→exec-requests→exec-results) because exec-results is frozen. Trace implementation is correct but e2e verification blocked by stall.
expected: End-to-end trace across all 3 pipeline stages
actual: PARTIAL — trace propagation verified in exec-requests, but end-to-end blocked by execution stall
recommendation: Re-verify end-to-end trace after execution stall is resolved.

evidence: 60s partition deltas: P1=+3297 (BSC+polygon+avalanche+fantom), P2=+5713 (arbitrum+optimism+base+scroll+blast), P3=+879 (ethereum+zksync+linea), P4=+16380 (solana). Total: +26269 events = ~438 events/s. All assigned chains active. P4 pairsMonitored=0 is expected (Solana program-account detection).
expected: All chains active on all partitions
actual: All 4 partitions, all 13 chains actively producing events. No silent chains.

evidence: Post-smoke: riskState=NORMAL, tradingAllowed=true, positionSizeMultiplier=1. No drawdown events during smoke test (simulation mode, no real losses).

execution-requests fill ratio: 5001/5000 = 100.02% (above 80% threshold). Coordinator still forwarding new requests (most recent entry timestamp ~just now, forwardedAt=1772540145874). Coordinator /api/health does not expose backpressure state. Cannot verify if EXECUTION_STREAM_BACKPRESSURE_RATIO mechanism is active or suppressed.
expected: Backpressure active and halting forwarding when stream > 80% full
actual: Stream 100% full, coordinator still forwarding. Backpressure either inactive or state not observable.
recommendation: 1) Add backpressure state to coordinator health response. 2) Verify backpressureRatio check uses correct MAXLEN value (5000 for exec-requests). 3) If mechanism is absent, coordinator will continue overwriting execution requests indefinitely.

evidence: All 4 partitions active during smoke: P1 delta=+3297, P2 delta=+5713, P3 delta=+879, P4 delta=+16380. No silent partitions. P3 lowest delta (Ethereum chain simulation slower pace expected).
